title: columellia oblonga subsp. sericea
intro: Columellia oblonga subsp. sericea, also known as Sericea Columbella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Calceolariaceae. It is a herbaceous perennial that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Traditionally, Columellia oblonga subsp. sericea is prepared as an infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in tinctures or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
